```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <span style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Workflows</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#3DA18A;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;">fixed</span>
   </div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.25em;justify-content:center;margin:0.7em 0;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);color:#2C8475;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;padding:0.3em 0.5em;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;">step 1</div>
    <span style="color:#9B8EA0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65em;">→</span>
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);color:#2C8475;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;padding:0.3em 0.5em;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;">step 2</div>
    <span style="color:#9B8EA0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65em;">→</span>
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);color:#2C8475;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;padding:0.3em 0.5em;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;">step 3</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;text-align:center;">Steps glued by code.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <span style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;">Agents</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;">dynamic</span>
   </div>
   <div style="position:relative;height:4em;margin:0.4em 0;">
    <div style="position:absolute;left:50%;top:0;transform:translateX(-50%);background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;padding:0.3em 0.6em;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;">decide</div>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 200 60" style="position:absolute;width:100%;height:100%;top:1.4em;" preserveAspectRatio="none">
     <path d="M100,0 L40,40 M100,0 L100,40 M100,0 L160,40" stroke="#E8C77E" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/>
    </svg>
    <div style="position:absolute;left:6%;bottom:0;background:#FFFBF0;color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.25em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #E8C77E;">read</div>
    <div style="position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:0;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#FFFBF0;color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.25em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #E8C77E;">test</div>
    <div style="position:absolute;right:6%;bottom:0;background:#FFFBF0;color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.25em 0.45em;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #E8C77E;">edit</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;text-align:center;">LLM picks each next step.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">
  Anthropic — <em>Building Effective Agents</em> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Claude Code = <strong style="color:#C4881A;">agent</strong>
 </div>

</div>
```
